subcodes.first_line: The Book from Our presence is unto him who hath quaffed the choice wine of Revelation, when God came with His Kingdom, invincible and impregnable [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا لمن شرب رحیق الوحی اذ اتی الله بملکوته الممتنع المنیع و مامنعته
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @chastisement and requital, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
